name: Asparagus Salad with Orange Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons grated orange peel (no white attached)
1 teaspoon finely chopped lemon balm, lemon thyme, or lemon verb
Salt, freshly ground black pepper & sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together the red wine vinegar, orange juice, orange peel, garlic, ginger, mustard, tarragon, and lemon balm.
2. Slowly whisk in the olive oil until thickened.
3. Add salt, pepper, and sugar to taste.
4. Peel the asparagus if larger than a pencil. Cut off any woody ends.
5. Place the asparagus in a large frying pan of boiling water, ensuring the water covers.
6. Cook for 3 to 5 minutes until tender. Drain well.
7. Pour the salad dressing over the asparagus and serve hot or cold.
Yield: 10 to 12 servings
